   "reasoning": "First things first, we need to stem the bleeding and keep our teachers from walking out the door. A funding boost will get us some breathing room and a strong teacher incentive will give us a chance to hang on to the talent we have. Transparancy report will also help our public image. I'm not convinced on the scholarship, attendance mandate just adds more paperwork, and more staff means more heads to deal with. Counseling programs can help with burnout, but not a priority right now.",
